name: quick-toshl
title: Quick Toshl
description: Add expense and income to your Toshl account
author: hoando

commands.name: expense
commands.title: Add Expense
commands.description: Add a new expense transaction to Toshl

commands.name: income
commands.title: Add Income
commands.description: Add a new income transaction to Toshl

commands.name: recent-transactions
commands.title: View Transactions
commands.description: View and manage recent Toshl transactions

commands.name: transfer
commands.title: Add Transfer
commands.description: Move money from one account to another

commands.name: budgets
commands.title: View Budgets
commands.description: View your budget progress and spending

commands.name: search-entries
commands.title: Search Entries
commands.description: Search and filter all entries by date range, category, tags, account, and more

commands.name: planning
commands.title: View Planning
commands.description: View your spending plan and predictions for this month or year (Pro feature)

commands.name: manage-categories
commands.title: Manage Categories
commands.description: Create, rename, or delete expense/income categories

commands.name: manage-budgets
commands.title: Manage Budgets
commands.description: Create, edit, or delete budgets (respects Toshl free/Pro limits)

commands.name: my-profile
commands.title: My Profile
commands.description: Show Toshl account profile, currency, locale, and API feature limits

tools.name: add-expense
tools.title: Add Expense
tools.description: Add a new expense to Toshl. Requires amount and description. Optional: completed, extraJson, locationId, basic recurring (isRecurring + repeatFrequency + repeatInterval, optional repeatEndDate/repeatCount). IDs from list-categories-tags. Vietnamese amount shortcuts (50k, 3 triệu).

tools.name: add-income
tools.title: Add Income
tools.description: Add a new income to Toshl. Requires amount and description. Optional: completed, extraJson, locationId, basic recurring fields. IDs from list-categories-tags. Vietnamese amount shortcuts.

tools.name: get-budgets
tools.title: Get Budgets
tools.description: Get current budget status from Toshl. Shows active budgets with their limits, spending, and remaining amounts. Use when the user asks about budget progress or spending limits.

tools.name: list-categories-tags
tools.title: List Categories and Tags
tools.description: List the user's available categories, tags, and accounts from Toshl. Use this when the user asks 'what categories do I have?', 'show my tags', or 'list my accounts'. Can filter by type (categories/tags/accounts) and entry type (expense/income).

tools.name: search-entries
tools.title: Search Entries
tools.description: Advanced search for Toshl entries with filtering. Use `from` and `to` (YYYY-MM-DD) for an explicit range; if either is set, they override `dateRange`. Otherwise use `dateRange` presets (today, last_7_days, this_month, etc.). Supports entry type, category/tag/account names, description search. Returns entries with optional summary statistics.

tools.name: get-planning
tools.title: Get Planning
tools.description: Get spending plan and predictions for this month or this year. Shows average expenses, incomes, balance, and period details with actual vs planned vs predicted values. Use when user asks about spending predictions, monthly plan, or financial outlook. Pro feature - free accounts will get 403.

tools.name: update-entry
tools.title: Update Entry
tools.description: Update an expense or income entry by entryId. Not for transfers (use update-transfer). Supports amount, description, date, categoryId, accountId, tagIds, currencyCode, updateMode for repeats, completed, extraJson, locationId.

tools.name: delete-entry
tools.title: Delete Entry
tools.description: Delete an entry by entryId. For repeating entries use deleteMode: one, tail, or all.

tools.name: add-transfer
tools.title: Add Transfer
tools.description: Record a transfer between two accounts. Requires amount, fromAccountId, toAccountId (use list-categories-tags for IDs). Optional description, currency, date.

tools.name: create-category
tools.title: Create Category
tools.description: Create a Toshl category with name and type expense|income.

tools.name: update-category
tools.title: Update Category
tools.description: Rename or change type of a category by categoryId (from list-categories-tags). System categories cannot be updated.

tools.name: create-tag
tools.title: Create Tag
tools.description: Create a tag with name, type expense|income, optional categoryId.

tools.name: update-tag
tools.title: Update Tag
tools.description: Update a tag by tagId with name, type, optional categoryId.

tools.name: create-account
tools.title: Create Account
tools.description: Create an account with name, optional currencyCode, initialBalance, type.

tools.name: update-account
tools.title: Update Account
tools.description: Update account by accountId: name, optional currencyCode, order, limit, initialBalance.

tools.name: create-budget
tools.title: Create Budget
tools.description: Create a monthly regular budget with name, limit, optional rollover and currencyCode. May fail with 403 on free Toshl limits.

tools.name: update-budget
tools.title: Update Budget
tools.description: Update budget by budgetId (from get-budgets): name, limit, rollover, optional updateMode one|tail|all.

tools.name: delete-budget
tools.title: Delete Budget
tools.description: Delete a budget by budgetId (from get-budgets). Irreversible on Toshl side.

tools.name: delete-category
tools.title: Delete Category
tools.description: Delete a category by categoryId from list-categories-tags. May affect entries.

tools.name: delete-tag
tools.title: Delete Tag
tools.description: Delete a tag by tagId from list-categories-tags.

tools.name: delete-account
tools.title: Delete Account
tools.description: Delete an account by accountId. May fail if Toshl rejects (linked data).

tools.name: update-transfer
tools.title: Update Transfer
tools.description: Update a transfer entry by entryId (must be a transfer). Requires fromAccountId, toAccountId; optional amount, date, description, currencyCode, updateMode for repeating transfers.

tools.name: get-me
tools.title: Get Profile
tools.description: Return current user profile from Toshl /me: currency, locale, timezone, pro status, limits.

tools.name: get-tag-sums
tools.title: Get Tag Sums
tools.description: Aggregated sums per tag for a date range (GET /tags/sums). Requires currency (defaults to user main from /me). Optional type filter.

tools.name: list-entry-locations
tools.title: List Entry Locations
tools.description: List saved entry locations for a date range (GET /entries/locations).

ai.instructions:
You are a financial assistant for Toshl expense tracking. Follow these rules strictly:

**CRITICAL - USE IDs, NOT NAMES:**
- User's categories/tags may have creative names (e.g., 'Có thực mới vực được đạo' for Food, emojis like '🍔 Eating')
- ALWAYS call list-categories-tags FIRST to get the ID mappings
- Use categoryId, tagIds, accountId parameters with exact IDs from the list
- Never guess category/tag names - always look them up first

**WORKFLOW:**
1. User says 'add 50k cơm trưa'
2. You call list-categories-tags to get {id: '123', name: '🍔 Có thực...'}
3. You determine which category fits (food-related)
4. You call add-expense with categoryId='123'

**AMOUNT PARSING:**
- 'k' or 'K' = 1,000 (e.g., '50k' = 50,000)
- 'triệu' or 'tr' = 1,000,000 (e.g., '3 triệu' = 3,000,000)
- Currency: Uses user's default from Toshl settings (auto-detected from /me API)

**DATE PARSING:**
- 'DD/MM', 'DD/MM/YYYY', 'yesterday', 'today' supported
- Default to today if no date specified

**LOANS & DEBTS:**
- 'cho vay' (lend) = expense, 'vay' (borrow) = income
- 'trả nợ' (repay) = expense, 'đòi nợ' (collect) = income

**LANGUAGE:**
- Respond in user's language (Vietnamese or English)
- Use friendly, concise messages

**UPDATE / DELETE ENTRIES:**
- Use search-entries to obtain entryId
- update-entry: expenses/incomes only; use update-transfer for transfers
- delete-entry: repeating entries use deleteMode one | tail | all

**TRANSFERS:**
- add-transfer: fromAccountId, toAccountId
- update-transfer: entryId + account IDs; optional updateMode for repeats

**METADATA:**
- create/update/delete category, tag, account, budget with IDs from list-categories-tags or get-budgets
- delete-category, delete-tag, delete-account, delete-budget tools exist
- get-me for profile; get-tag-sums and list-entry-locations for analytics/locations
- Toshl may return 403 on free-plan limits

**ENTRY EXTRAS:**
- update-entry supports completed (boolean) and extraJson (JSON object) for Toshl private metadata

**CONFLICTS:**
- If the user hits a conflict error, suggest refreshing data (search-entries / list-categories-tags) and retrying

**RATE LIMITS:**
- On HTTP 429, suggest waiting and retrying later.

preferences.name: forceRefreshCache
preferences.title: Force Refresh Cache
preferences.description: Uses conditional requests on each load. If the API errors, the last successful metadata may be reused for up to 24 hours. Enable this, run any command once, then turn it off to clear the cache—e.g. after changes in the Toshl web app.
preferences.label: Clear cache on next run

preferences.name: demoData
preferences.title: Demo Data
preferences.description: Use fake data for demonstration purposes (useful for screenshots).
preferences.label: Enable Demo Data

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
